channel.title: ParticipatoryDemocracy on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in ParticipatoryDemocracy on Nature Works

item.title: Workshop on Hearing Unheard Voices plus Biodiversity Collage
item.description:
I went to a workshop yesterday and a collage the day before, about deliberative democracy with a big dose of biodiversity

I went to a 3 hour workshop yesterday, Workshop on Hearing Unheard Voices: Listening to future generations and nonhuman nature in Climate Assemblies. http://localhost:1313/blog/240118-unheard/

item.title: Participatory Democracy
item.description:
Democracy is good for the environment

On Monday 16 January, I went to a 1.5 hour Zoom talk and discussion about a participatory democracy project run by an organisation called Gwyrddni (translates as Green Us I think). http://localhost:1313/blog/230118-democracy/
